title: evacidium discolor
side_effects: Evacidium discolor can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxins has also been linked to liver and kidney damage, as well as increased risk of certain types of cancer. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extracts can cause hallucinations, convulsions, and even coma. Furthermore, improper use of Evacidium discolor can also lead to digestive issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea.
